basic_details.job_title: IIT Bhilai Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Bhilai (IIT Bhilai)
basic_details.short_information: The Indian Institute of Technology Bhilai (IIT Bhilai) Senior Research Fellow Notification 2026 has been released on the official website IIT Bhilai. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Bhilai Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years. Relaxation will be given to SC/ST/OBC/Physically Handicapped and Women candidates as per Institute Norms.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree in Mechanical/Chemical Engineering/Technology or equivalent with first class, 60% marks (55% marks for SC/ST) or equivalent, At least two years of research experience
qualification.details: Master's degree in Mechanical/Chemical Engineering/Technology or equivalent with first class, 60% marks (55% marks for SC/ST) and at least two years of research experience.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to Apply Online for IIT Bhilai Senior Research Fellow recruitment?
faq.answer: 21 May 2026. Candidates are advised to reach the venue on time with all necessary documents.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Senior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's degree in Mechanical/Chemical Engineering/Technology or equivalent with first class, 60% marks (55% marks for SC/ST) and at least two years of research experience.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Senior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Senior Research Fellow post is 35 years. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories as per institute norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Senior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 42,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for the IIT Bhilai Senior Research Fellow recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: This is a contractual job opportunity at IIT Bhilai.

faq.question: Q7. Where can I find the official notification?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article. It is recommended to read it thoroughly before attending the interview.
